> A massage therapist business called 'Lilila' based in Eilat, Israel. The name 'Lilila' has a soft, feminine, and somewhat mystical sound, suggesting a calming and luxurious atmosphere. Located in the resort city of Eilat, the business likely caters to both tourists and locals seeking relaxation and wellness treatments.

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About לילילה
A massage therapist business called 'Lilila' based in Eilat, Israel. The name 'Lilila' has a soft, feminine, and somewhat mystical sound, suggesting a calming and luxurious atmosphere. Located in the resort city of Eilat, the business likely caters to both tourists and locals seeking relaxation and wellness treatments.

## Target Audience
- מקצוענים עירוניים

## Industry
בריאות ורווחה / טיפולי גוף
